title: tardavel tenella
side_effects: Tardavel tenella can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, dizziness, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use of the plant's extract can also lead to liver damage and kidney problems, which can be life-threatening if not treated promptly. In extreme cases, overexposure to the plant's toxic compounds can cause respiratory failure, seizures, and even coma. If you suspect you have been exposed to the tardavel tenella plant, seek medical attention immediately to prevent these serious side effects.
